---
title: "Trait Data"
author: "Anoob Prakash"
output: html_document
date: "03/07/2022"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_document:
    theme: cosmo  
    number_sections: false
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{css zoom-lib-src, echo = FALSE}
script src = "https://ajax.googleapis.com/ajax/libs/jquery/3.4.1/jquery.min.js"
```

```{js zoom-jquery, echo = FALSE}
 $(document).ready(function() {
    $('body').prepend('<div class=\"zoomDiv\"><img src=\"\" class=\"zoomImg\"></div>');
    // onClick function for all plots (img's)
    $('img:not(.zoomImg)').click(function() {
      $('.zoomImg').attr('src', $(this).attr('src')).css({width: '100%'});
      $('.zoomDiv').css({opacity: '1', width: 'auto', border: '1px solid white', borderRadius: '5px', position: 'fixed', top: '50%', left: '50%', marginRight: '-50%', transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)', boxShadow: '0px 0px 50px #888888', zIndex: '50', overflow: 'auto', maxHeight: '100%'});
    });
    // onClick function for zoomImg
    $('img.zoomImg').click(function() {
      $('.zoomDiv').css({opacity: '0', width: '0%'}); 
    });
  });
```

```{r}
require(stringr)
require(viridis)
require(lmerTest)
require(tidyverse)
require(readxl)
```

```{r}
# local machine
# setwd("Z:/Anoob/Polygenic_Adaptation/ANALYSIS")

# server
setwd("~/mydata/Anoob/Polygenic_Adaptation/ANALYSIS")

source("./Qpc_function.R")
```

## Data {.tabset .tabset-fade .tabset-pills}

```{r}
# Meta data
Meta <- read.table("../../MCMCglmm/Exome/RS_Exome_metadata.txt", sep="\t",header=T)
```

### Trait

```{r}
budbreak_2020 <- read.csv("../../MCMCglmm/trait_data/BudBreak_2020_cGDD.csv", stringsAsFactors = T)
budset_2019 <- read.csv("../../MCMCglmm/trait_data/BudSet_2019.csv", stringsAsFactors = T)
budset_2020 <- read.csv("../../MCMCglmm/trait_data/BudSet_2020.csv", stringsAsFactors = T)

growth_2019 <- read.csv("../../MCMCglmm/trait_data/Growth_2019.csv", stringsAsFactors = T)
growth_2020 <- read.csv("../../MCMCglmm/trait_data/Growth_2020.csv", stringsAsFactors = T)
Plasticity <- read.csv("../../MCMCglmm/trait_data/Plasticity.csv", stringsAsFactors = T)
Plasticity <- Plasticity[,c("Family","PC1","BudBreak_cGDD","BudBreak_DOY","BudSet_2019","BudSet_2020")]
colnames(Plasticity) <- c("Family","PC1","BudBreak_cGDD_plasticity","BudBreak_DOY_plasticity",
                          "BudSet_2019_plasticity","BudSet_2020_plasticity")
# Z:\\Anoob\\MCMCglmm\\trait_data\\BudBreak_2020.csv

# Add mBed ----------------------------------------------------------------
budbreak_2020$mBed <- paste0(budbreak_2020$Garden,"_",budbreak_2020$Bed)
budset_2019$mBed <- paste0(budset_2019$Garden,"_",budset_2019$Bed)
budset_2020$mBed <- paste0(budset_2020$Garden,"_",budset_2020$Bed)
growth_2019$mBed <- paste0(growth_2019$Garden,"_",growth_2019$Bed)
growth_2020$mBed <- paste0(growth_2020$Garden,"_",growth_2020$Bed)

# Rename Region -------------------------------------------------
colnames(Meta)[colnames(Meta)=="Pop"] <- "Population"
Meta$Region <- as.factor(Meta$Region)
Meta$Region <- plyr::mapvalues(Meta$Region, from = c("C", "M", "E"), to = c("Core", "Margin", "Edge"));Meta$Region <- factor(Meta$Region,levels = c("Core", "Margin", "Edge"))

# remove family YRB_01
Meta <- Meta[Meta$Family!="YRB_01",]

meta <- as.data.frame(Meta$Family);colnames(meta)[1] <- "Family"
nrow(meta)
```

### biomass

```{r}

## VT
biomass_VT <- read.csv("../../MCMCglmm/trait_data/biomass_VT_2020.csv", stringsAsFactors = T)
biomass_VT <- biomass_VT[!is.na(biomass_VT$Bag_plus_root_weight),]
biomass_VT$Garden <- "Vermont"
biomass_VT$Bed <- gsub(".*_D.*","D",
                     gsub(".*_A.*","A",
                          gsub(".*_B.*","B",
                               gsub(".*_C.*","C",
                                    gsub(".*_E.*","E",biomass_VT$plant_ID,perl=T)))))

biomass_VT$Family <- sub("_VT.*","",biomass_VT$plant_ID,perl=T)
biomass_VT$Population <- sub("_.*","",biomass_VT$plant_ID,perl=T)
colnames(biomass_VT)[3] <- "MainStem"
colnames(biomass_VT)[4] <- "SideBranch"
colnames(biomass_VT)[6] <- "Root"

## MD
biomass_MD_AG <- readxl::read_xlsx("../../MCMCglmm/trait_data/biomass_MD_aboveGround_2020.csv.xlsx")
biomass_MD_BG <- readxl::read_xlsx("../../MCMCglmm/trait_data/biomass_MD_belowGround_2020.csv.xlsx")
biomass_MD <- merge(biomass_MD_AG,biomass_MD_BG[,c("plantID","RootDryWght")])
biomass_MD <- biomass_MD[,c("plantID","MainStem","SideBranch","RootDryWght","FinalArch","Notes")]
colnames(biomass_MD)[1] <- "plant_ID"
colnames(biomass_MD)[4] <- "Root"
colnames(biomass_MD)[5] <- "Architecture"

biomass_MD <- biomass_MD[!is.na(biomass_MD$SideBranch),]
biomass_MD$Garden <- "Maryland"
biomass_MD$Bed <- gsub(".*_D.*","D",
                     gsub(".*_A.*","A",
                          gsub(".*_B.*","B",
                               gsub(".*_C.*","C",
                                    gsub(".*_E.*","E",biomass_MD$plant_ID,perl=T)))))

biomass_MD$Family <- sub("_MD.*","",biomass_MD$plant_ID,perl=T)
biomass_MD$Population <- sub("_.*","",biomass_MD$plant_ID,perl=T)
```

```{r eval = F, echo=F}
## NC
## changes made on local system
files.list <- list.files(path = "C:\\Users\\Anoob Prakash\\Dropbox\\Spruce_CommonGarden_Data\\Biomass\\NC\\1_total\\",pattern='*.xlsx',full.names=T)
df.list <- lapply(files.list, read_excel)
require(data.table)
df <- rbindlist(df.list, idcol = "id",fill=T)
colnames(df)[2] <- "plant_ID"
colnames(df)[5] <- "Architecture"
colnames(df)[9] <- "SideBranch"
colnames(df)[10] <- "MainStem"
colnames(df)[11] <- "Root"
colnames(df)[12] <- "BranchOnly"
colnames(df)[8] <- "NeedleOnly"
df$SideBranch <- as.numeric(df$SideBranch)

df2 <- df[is.na(df$SideBranch),]
df <- df[!is.na(df$SideBranch),]
df2$NeedleOnly <- as.numeric(df2$NeedleOnly)
df2$BranchOnly <- as.numeric(df2$BranchOnly)
df2$SideBranch <- df2$NeedleOnly + df2$BranchOnly
df_merge <- rbind(df,df2)

# write.csv(df_merge, "Z:\\Anoob\\MCMCglmm\\trait_data\\biomass_NC_2020.csv")
# convert blank values to NA
# df <- df %>% mutate_all(na_if,"")

# df <- df %>% mutate (SideBranch = coalesce(SideBranch1,SideBranch2)) 
```

```{r}
biomass_NC <- read.csv("../../MCMCglmm/trait_data/biomass_NC_2020.csv", stringsAsFactors = T) # bed C excluded as roots not measured 

biomass_NC <- biomass_NC[!is.na(biomass_NC$SideBranch),]
biomass_NC$Garden <- "North_Carolina"
biomass_NC$Bed <- gsub(".*_D.*","D",
                     gsub(".*_A.*","A",
                          gsub(".*_B.*","B",
                               gsub(".*_E.*","E",biomass_NC$plant_ID,perl=T))))

biomass_NC$Family <- sub("_NC.*","",biomass_NC$plant_ID,perl=T)
biomass_NC$Population <- sub("_.*","",biomass_NC$plant_ID,perl=T)
```

```{r}
biomass_VT <- biomass_VT[,c("plant_ID","Population","Family","Garden","Bed","MainStem","SideBranch","Root","comments")]
colnames(biomass_VT)[9] <- "Notes"
biomass_VT$Architecture <- NA
biomass_MD <- biomass_MD[,c("plant_ID","Population","Family","Garden","Bed","MainStem","SideBranch","Root","Notes","Architecture")]
biomass_NC <- biomass_NC[,c("plant_ID","Population","Family","Garden","Bed","MainStem","SideBranch","Root","Notes","Architecture")]

biomass <- rbind(biomass_VT,biomass_MD,biomass_NC)
biomass$mBed <- paste0(biomass$Garden,"_",biomass$Bed)
biomass$MainStem <- as.numeric(biomass$MainStem)
biomass$Root <- as.numeric(biomass$Root)
biomass$Population <- as.factor(biomass$Population)
biomass$Family <- as.factor(biomass$Family)
biomass$Garden <- as.factor(biomass$Garden)
biomass$mBed <- as.factor(biomass$mBed)

biomass$TotalDry <- biomass$MainStem + biomass$SideBranch + biomass$Root # total dry biomass
biomass$RootShoot <- (biomass$Root) / (biomass$MainStem + biomass$SideBranch) # root:shoot ratio
biomass$SideBr_MainSt <-  biomass$SideBranch/biomass$MainStem # side branch:Main stem ratio

# remove NaNs and convert it into NAs
biomass$SideBr_MainSt[is.nan(biomass$SideBr_MainSt)]<-NA
biomass$RootShoot[is.nan(biomass$RootShoot)]<-NA
biomass$TotalDry[is.nan(biomass$TotalDry)]<-NA


# write.csv(biomass, "Z:/Anoob/Polygenic_Adaptation/TraitData//biomass_2020.csv")
```

### isotopes

```{r}
# VT
isotope_VT <- readxl::read_xlsx("../../MCMCglmm/trait_data/isotopes/VT_isotopes.XLSX")
colnames(isotope_VT)[2] <- "SampleID"
colnames(isotope_VT)[4] <- "percentC"
colnames(isotope_VT)[6] <- "percentN"
# colnames(isotope_VT)[7] <- "Notes"
isotope_VT$Notes <- NA
isotope_VT$Family <- sub("_VT.*","",isotope_VT$SampleID,perl=T)
isotope_VT$Population <- sub("_.*","",isotope_VT$Family,perl=T)
isotope_VT$Bed <- gsub(".*_D.*","D",
                     gsub(".*_A.*","A",
                          gsub(".*_B.*","B",
                               gsub(".*_E.*","E",
                                    gsub(".*_C.*","C", isotope_VT$SampleID,perl=T)))))
isotope_VT$plant_ID <- paste0(isotope_VT$Family,"_",isotope_VT$Bed,"_VT")
isotope_VT$Garden <- "Vermont"
isotope_VT <- isotope_VT[,c("plant_ID","Population","Family","Garden","Bed","d13C","percentC","d15N","percentN","Notes")]

# NC
isotope_NC <- readxl::read_xlsx("../../MCMCglmm/trait_data/isotopes/NC_isotopes.XLSX")
colnames(isotope_NC)[2] <- "SampleID"
colnames(isotope_NC)[4] <- "percentC"
colnames(isotope_NC)[6] <- "percentN"
colnames(isotope_NC)[7] <- "Notes"
isotope_NC$Family <- sub("_NC.*","",isotope_NC$SampleID,perl=T)
isotope_NC$Population <- sub("_.*","",isotope_NC$Family,perl=T)
isotope_NC$Bed <- gsub(".*_D.*","D",
                     gsub(".*_A.*","A",
                          gsub(".*_B.*","B",
                               gsub(".*_E.*","E",
                                    gsub(".*_C.*","C", isotope_NC$SampleID,perl=T)))))
isotope_NC$plant_ID <- paste0(isotope_NC$Family,"_",isotope_NC$Bed,"_NC")
isotope_NC$Garden <- "North_Carolina"
isotope_NC <- isotope_NC[,c("plant_ID","Population","Family","Garden","Bed","d13C","percentC","d15N","percentN","Notes")]


# MD
isotope_MD <- readxl::read_xlsx("../../MCMCglmm/trait_data/isotopes/MD_isotopes.XLSX")
colnames(isotope_MD)[2] <- "SampleID"
colnames(isotope_MD)[4] <- "percentC"
colnames(isotope_MD)[6] <- "percentN"
colnames(isotope_MD)[7] <- "Notes"
isotope_MD$Family <- sub("_MD.*","",isotope_MD$SampleID,perl=T)
isotope_MD$Population <- sub("_.*","",isotope_MD$Family,perl=T)
isotope_MD$Bed <- gsub(".*_D.*","D",
                     gsub(".*_A.*","A",
                          gsub(".*_B.*","B",
                               gsub(".*_E.*","E",
                                    gsub(".*_C.*","C", isotope_MD$SampleID,perl=T)))))
isotope_MD$plant_ID <- paste0(isotope_MD$Family,"_",isotope_MD$Bed,"_MD")
isotope_MD$Garden <- "Maryland"
isotope_MD <- isotope_MD[,c("plant_ID","Population","Family","Garden","Bed","d13C","percentC","d15N","percentN","Notes")]

# combine data set
isotope <- rbind(isotope_VT,isotope_MD,isotope_NC)
isotope$CN_ratio <- isotope$percentC/isotope$percentN
isotope$mBed <- paste0(isotope$Garden,"_",isotope$Bed)
isotope$d13C <- as.numeric(isotope$d13C)
isotope$percentC <- as.numeric(isotope$percentC)
isotope$d15N <- as.numeric(isotope$d15N)
isotope$percentN <- as.numeric(isotope$percentN)
isotope$Garden <- as.factor(isotope$Garden)
isotope$mBed <- as.factor(isotope$mBed)

# write.csv(isotope, "Z:/Anoob/Polygenic_Adaptation/TraitData//isotope_2020.csv")
```

### Isotope and Biomass plasticity\
```{r}
isobio_p <- read.csv("../TraitData/biomass_isotope_plasticity_2020.csv")
# isobio_p <- merge(isobio_p,Meta, by="Family")
isobio_p <- isobio_p[,c("Family","TotalDry_plasticity","RootShoot_plasticity",
                        "SideBranch_MainStem_plasticity","Delta13Carbon_plasticity",
                        "Delta15Nitrogen_plasticity","PercentN_plasticity",
                        "CN_ratio_plasticity")]
```


## Models to generate blups {.tabset .tabset-fade .tabset-pills}

### Traits

```{r}
# Create the growth values for 2019-2020
growth_full <- merge(x=subset(growth_2019, select=-c(Height_Fall2019,Growth)), 
                     y=growth_2020[,c("plant_ID","FinalHT")],
                     by.x="plant_ID")
growth_full <- merge(x=growth_full, 
                     y=Plasticity[,c("Family","PC1")],
                     by.x="Family")
growth_full$Growth <- growth_full$FinalHT - growth_full$initial_h
```

```{r}
# Trait blups -------------------------------------------------------------
# lmer for budbreak 2020 
budbreak_20_mod <- lmer(data = budbreak_2020, 
                        cGDD ~ Garden +  
                          (1|Family) + (1|mBed))
# setting up the blups for budbreak
coef_budbreak_20 <- coef(budbreak_20_mod)
blup_budbreak_20 <- cbind.data.frame(row.names(coef_budbreak_20[[1]]),
                                     coef_budbreak_20$Family$`(Intercept)`)
colnames(blup_budbreak_20) <- c("Family","Budbreak_2020")
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# lmer for budset 2019 
budset_19_mod <- lmer(data = budset_2019, 
                      BudSet ~ Garden +  
                        (1|Family) + (1|mBed))

# setting up the blups for budset 2019
coef_budset_19 <- coef(budset_19_mod)
blup_budset_19 <- cbind.data.frame(row.names(coef_budset_19[[1]]),
                                   coef_budset_19$Family$`(Intercept)`)
colnames(blup_budset_19) <- c("Family","BudSet_2019")
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# lmer for budset 2020 
budset_20_mod <- lmer(data = budset_2020, 
                      BudSet ~ Garden +  
                        (1|Family) + (1|mBed))

# setting up the blups for budset 2020
coef_budset_20 <- coef(budset_20_mod)
blup_budset_20 <- cbind.data.frame(row.names(coef_budset_20[[1]]),
                                   coef_budset_20$Family$`(Intercept)`)
colnames(blup_budset_20) <- c("Family","BudSet_2020")
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# lmer for growth  
growth_full_mod <- lmer(data = growth_full, 
                        Growth ~ Garden +  
                          (1|Family) + (1|mBed))
# setting up the blups for growth
coef_growth_full <- coef(growth_full_mod)
blup_growth_full <- cbind.data.frame(row.names(coef_growth_full[[1]]),
                                     coef_growth_full$Family$`(Intercept)`)
colnames(blup_growth_full) <- c("Family","Growth")
```

### Biomass\

- Log transform the ratios
```{r}
# biomass blups -------------------------------------------------------------
# lmer for TotalDry biomass 
TotalDry_mod <- lmer(data = biomass, 
                        TotalDry ~ Garden +  
                          (1|Family) + (1|mBed))
# setting up the blups for TotalDry biomass
coef_TotalDry_mod <- coef(TotalDry_mod)
blup_TotalDry_mod <- cbind.data.frame(row.names(coef_TotalDry_mod[[1]]),
                                     coef_TotalDry_mod$Family$`(Intercept)`)
colnames(blup_TotalDry_mod) <- c("Family","TotalDry")

# lmer for Root:Shoot ratio 

# using the standardized values

RootShoot_mod <- lmer(data = biomass, # REML=FALSE,
                        log(RootShoot) ~ Garden +  
                          (1|Family) + (1|mBed), control = lmerControl(optimizer ="Nelder_Mead"))
summary(RootShoot_mod)
# setting up the blups for Root:Shoot ratio
coef_RootShoot_mod <- coef(RootShoot_mod)
blup_RootShoot_mod <- cbind.data.frame(row.names(coef_RootShoot_mod[[1]]),
                                     coef_RootShoot_mod$Family$`(Intercept)`)
colnames(blup_RootShoot_mod) <- c("Family","RootShoot")

# lmer for SideBr_MainSt 
SideBr_MainSt_mod <- lmer(data = biomass, 
                        log(SideBr_MainSt) ~ Garden +  
                          (1|Family) + (1|mBed))
summary(SideBr_MainSt_mod)
# setting up the blups for Relative Needle biomass
coef_SideBr_MainSt_mod <- coef(SideBr_MainSt_mod)
blup_SideBr_MainSt_mod <- cbind.data.frame(row.names(coef_SideBr_MainSt_mod[[1]]),
                                     coef_SideBr_MainSt_mod$Family$`(Intercept)`)
colnames(blup_SideBr_MainSt_mod) <- c("Family","SideBranch_MainStem")

# combine the data frame for biomass blups
biomass_blups <- list(as.data.frame(blup_TotalDry_mod),as.data.frame(blup_RootShoot_mod),as.data.frame(blup_SideBr_MainSt_mod))

#merge all data frames in list
biomass_blups <- biomass_blups %>% reduce(full_join, by='Family')
```


### Isotopes

```{r}
# isotope blups -------------------------------------------------------------
# lmer for delta 13 carbon 
d13C_mod <- lmer(data = isotope, 
                        d13C ~ Garden +  
                          (1|Family) + (1|mBed))
# setting up the blups for delta 13 carbon
coef_d13C_mod <- coef(d13C_mod)
blup_d13C_mod <- cbind.data.frame(row.names(coef_d13C_mod[[1]]),
                                     coef_d13C_mod$Family$`(Intercept)`)
colnames(blup_d13C_mod) <- c("Family","delta13C")


# lmer for delta 15 nitrogen 
d15N_mod <- lmer(data = isotope, 
                        d15N ~ Garden +  
                          (1|Family) + (1|mBed))
# setting up the blups for delta 13 nitrogen
coef_d15N_mod <- coef(d15N_mod)
blup_d15N_mod <- cbind.data.frame(row.names(coef_d15N_mod[[1]]),
                                     coef_d15N_mod$Family$`(Intercept)`)
colnames(blup_d15N_mod) <- c("Family","delta15N")

# lmer for percent nitrogen 
percentN_mod <- lmer(data = isotope, 
                        percentN ~ Garden +  
                          (1|Family) + (1|mBed))
# setting up the blups for percent nitrogen
coef_percentN_mod <- coef(percentN_mod)
blup_percentN_mod <- cbind.data.frame(row.names(coef_percentN_mod[[1]]),
                                     coef_percentN_mod$Family$`(Intercept)`)
colnames(blup_percentN_mod) <- c("Family","percentN")

# lmer for CN_ratio 
CN_ratio_mod <- lmer(data = isotope, 
                        CN_ratio ~ Garden +  
                          (1|Family) + (1|mBed))
# setting up the blups for percent nitrogen
coef_CN_ratio_mod <- coef(CN_ratio_mod)
blup_CN_ratio_mod <- cbind.data.frame(row.names(coef_CN_ratio_mod[[1]]),
                                     coef_CN_ratio_mod$Family$`(Intercept)`)
colnames(blup_CN_ratio_mod) <- c("Family","CN_ratio")

# combine the data frame for biomass blups
isotope_blups <- list(as.data.frame(blup_d13C_mod),as.data.frame(blup_d15N_mod),
                      as.data.frame(blup_percentN_mod),as.data.frame(blup_CN_ratio_mod))

#merge all data frames in list
isotope_blups <- isotope_blups %>% reduce(full_join, by='Family')

```

### Isotope and Biomass plasticity\
```{r}
isobio_p <- read.csv("../TraitData/biomass_isotope_plasticity_2020.csv")

isobio_p <- isobio_p[,c("Family","TotalDry_plasticity","RootShoot_plasticity",
                        "SideBranch_MainStem_plasticity","Delta13Carbon_plasticity",
                        "Delta15Nitrogen_plasticity","PercentN_plasticity",
                        "CN_ratio_plasticity")]
```

# Create blup table

```{r}
Plasticity <- Plasticity[,c("Family","BudBreak_cGDD_plasticity",
                          "BudSet_2019_plasticity","BudSet_2020_plasticity")]

#put all data frames into list
df_list <- list(as.data.frame(blup_budbreak_20), as.data.frame(blup_budset_19), 
                as.data.frame(blup_budset_20),as.data.frame(blup_growth_full),
                as.data.frame(Plasticity), as.data.frame(isobio_p),
                as.data.frame(biomass_blups),as.data.frame(isotope_blups))

#merge all data frames in list
bluptable <- df_list %>% reduce(full_join, by='Family')
famKin <- as.data.frame(rownames(myK))
colnames(famKin) <- "Family"
bluptable <- merge(x=famKin,y=bluptable,by="Family", all.x=T)

# write.csv(bluptable, "/home/Anoob/mydata/Anoob/Polygenic_Adaptation/TraitData/trait_blups_complete.csv")
```

# Discrimination against delta 13C
```{r}
# Function to convert delta13C to discrimination (Delta13C)
delta_to_delta13C <- function(delta13C_sample, delta13C_air = -8) {
  delta13C_sample_ratio <- delta13C_sample / 1000 + 1
  delta13C_air_ratio <- delta13C_air / 1000 + 1
  delta13C <- (delta13C_air_ratio - delta13C_sample_ratio) / delta13C_sample_ratio * 1000
  return(delta13C)
}

# Function to calculate intrinsic water use efficiency (iWUE)
calculate_iWUE <- function(delta13C, ca = 400) {
  a <- 4.4  # Fractionation during CO2 diffusion through stomata
  b <- 27   # Fractionation associated with carboxylation
  ci <- ca * (delta13C - a) / (b - a)
  iWUE <- ca * (1 - ci/ca) / 1.6
  return(iWUE)
}

# Example data (replace with your own)
delta13C_values <- isotope$d13c

# Convert delta13C to Delta13C
delta13C <- sapply(delta13C_values, delta_to_delta13C)

# Calculate iWUE
iWUE <- sapply(delta13C, calculate_iWUE)

# Create a data frame with results
results <- data.frame(delta13C_sample = delta13C_values,
                      Delta13C = delta13C,
                      iWUE = iWUE)

# Print results
print(results)

# Plot the relationship between Delta13C and iWUE
plot(delta13C, iWUE, xlab = "Î”13C (â€°)", ylab = "iWUE (ÎĽmol/mol)",
     main = "Relationship between Î”13C and iWUE")
abline(lm(iWUE ~ delta13C), col = "red")

# Calculate correlation coefficient
correlation <- cor(delta13C, iWUE)
print(paste("Correlation coefficient:", round(correlation, 3)))

# Perform linear regression
model <- lm(iWUE ~ delta13C)
summary(model)
```
